prompt: An isometric pixel art scene depicting a medieval village, complete with cobblestone pathways and villagers in traditional attire.
prompt_refined: An isometric pixel art scene depicting a medieval village under bright daylight. Winding cobblestone pathways extend from the foreground, leading towards a modest market square in the midground. Traditional timber-framed houses with thatched roofs are neatly arranged along both sides of the pathways. Several villagers in authentic traditional attire are strolling along the paths and gathered around the market square, which features a central well.
objects: Winding cobblestone pathways (extending from the foreground)
Traditional timber-framed houses with thatched roofs (arranged along pathways)
